name: jobbees
description: JOBBees — Australian peer-to-peer task marketplace monorepo

pnpm.comment: Pinned versions explained: (1) ESLint v9 because eslint-plugin-react (used by Next.js's eslint-config-next) calls the legacy context.getFilename() API, which ESLint v10 removed. (2) TypeScript 5.9.2 because v6 deprecated `baseUrl` and other tsconfig options with hard CI errors. v5 is the explicit CLAUDE.md rule 13 baseline. NOTE: Prisma is intentionally NOT pinned here — packages/prisma/package.json declares ^7.8.0 because we've migrated the schema to v7 patterns (prisma.config.ts + PrismaPg adapter in seed.ts). The ^7.8.0 caret allows patches but not v8. Do NOT bump ESLint or TypeScript without an ADR per CLAUDE.md rule 13.
